metadata.description: On Squarespace, register a new account and create a personal portfolio website using the "Portfolio" template, set the site title to "My Portfolio", complete initialization and enter the editor

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: On Squarespace, register a new account and create a personal portfolio website using the "Portfolio" template, set the site title to "My Portfolio", complete initialization and enter the editor
